---
title: ""
format: 
  html:
    page-layout: custom
    toc: false
    self-contained: true
    include-in-header:
      - text: |
          <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.5.0/css/all.min.css">
          <style>
            :root {
                --apple-black: #1d1d1f;
                --apple-grey: #f5f5f7;
                --text-secondary: #86868b;
                --apple-blue: #0066cc;
            }
            body { 
                margin: 0; background-color: #ffffff; color: var(--apple-black);
                font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "SF Pro Display", sans-serif;
                -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
            }
            /* Hide Quarto default elements to maintain the "App" look */
            .quarto-title-block, #title-block-header, .navbar { display: none !important; }
            
            /* --- HEADER & SEARCH --- */
            .header-section { text-align: center; margin-top: 80px; }
            .title-row { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 15px; }
            .title-row h1 { font-size: 52px; font-weight: 700; margin: 0; letter-spacing: -0.02em; }
            .search-trigger { font-size: 18px; opacity: 0.2; cursor: pointer; transition: 0.3s; }
            .search-trigger:hover { opacity: 0.8; }
            .search-slide-wrap {
                width: 100%; max-width: 400px; height: 0; opacity: 0; overflow: hidden;
                margin: 0 auto; display: flex; align-items: center; background: var(--apple-grey);
                border-radius: 12px; transition: all 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);
            }
            .search-slide-wrap.active { height: 45px; opacity: 1; margin-top: 20px; padding: 0 15px; }
            .search-slide-wrap input { width: 100%; border: none; background: transparent; font-size: 16px; outline: none; padding: 10px; }

            /* --- FILTERS --- */
            .filter-container { display: flex; justify-content: center; margin: 40px auto; }
            .filter-bar { background: var(--apple-grey); padding: 4px; border-radius: 25px; display: flex; }
            .filter-btn {
                border: none; background: transparent; padding: 10px 22px;
                font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: var(--text-secondary);
                cursor: pointer; border-radius: 20px; transition: 0.3s ease;
            }
            .filter-btn.active { color: #fff; background: var(--apple-black); }

            /* --- BENTO GRID --- */
            .gallery-container {
                max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto 100px; padding: 0 20px;
                display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 24px;
            }
            .bento-card {
                background: var(--apple-grey); border-radius: 28px; padding: 35px;
                min-height: 380px; display: flex; flex-direction: column;
                transition: all 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); cursor: pointer;
            }
            .bento-card:hover { transform: translateY(-8px); background: #ffffff; box-shadow: 0 20px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.05); }
            .w-2-3 { grid-column: span 2; }
            .w-1-3 { grid-column: span 1; }
            .hidden { display: none; }

            /* --- CONTENT STYLES --- */
            .pill-tag { background: rgba(0,0,0,0.05); padding: 5px 12px; border-radius: 12px; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; }
            .bento-card h2 { font-size: 32px; font-weight: 700; margin: 15px 0 8px; }
            .cycler-stage { height: 32px; overflow: hidden; margin-bottom: 15px; }
            .word-cycler { display: flex; flex-direction: column; }
            .word-cycler span { font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 32px; height: 32px; }
            .description { font-size: 15px; color: var(--text-secondary); line-height: 1.5; flex-grow: 1; }
            .grad-rat { background: linear-gradient(180deg, #0071e3, #5ac8fa); -webkit-background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; }
            .grad-dot { background: linear-gradient(180deg, #5e5ce6, #af52de); -webkit-background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; }
          </style>
---

```{=html}
<div class="header-section">
    <div class="title-row">
        <h1>The Book.</h1>
        <i class="fas fa-search search-trigger" onclick="toggleSearch(event)"></i>
    </div>
    <div class="search-slide-wrap" id="searchBar" onclick="event.stopPropagation()">
        <i class="fas fa-search" style="color:var(--text-secondary); font-size: 14px;"></i>
        <input type="text" id="searchInput" placeholder="Search documentation..." onkeyup="updateGallery()">
    </div>
</div>

<div class="filter-container">
    <div class="filter-bar">
        <button class="filter-btn active" data-filter="all">All</button>
        <button class="filter-btn" data-filter="ratcrate">Ratcrate</button>
        <button class="filter-btn" data-filter="tooling">Tooling</button>
    </div>
</div>

<div class="gallery-container" id="grid">
    <div class="bento-card w-2-3" onclick="window.location.href='rat-core/index.qmd'" data-cat="ratcrate" data-words='["Crates.io Crawler", "Metadata Engine", "Rust Caching"]'>
        <div class="top-row"><div class="pill-tag">Core Engine</div><i class="fab fa-rust"></i></div>
        <h2 class="grad-rat">ratcrate-core</h2>
        <div class="cycler-stage"><div class="word-cycler"></div></div>
        <p class="description">The backbone of the Ratatui ecosystem index. Handles high-performance crawling and crate enrichment.</p>
    </div>

    <div class="bento-card w-1-3" onclick="window.location.href='doc2quarto/index.qmd'" data-cat="tooling" data-words='["Note to Doc", "Automated Skeleton", "Markdown Power"]'>
        <div class="top-row"><div class="pill-tag">Doc Tool</div><i class="fab fa-python"></i></div>
        <h2 class="grad-dot">doc2quarto</h2>
        <div class="cycler-stage"><div class="word-cycler"></div></div>
        <p class="description">Streamlining the conversion of technical notes into structured Quarto documentation.</p>
    </div>
</div>

<script>
    const WORD_HEIGHT = 32;
    const PAUSE = 2000;
    let cardTimers = new Map();

    function toggleSearch(e) {
        e.stopPropagation();
        document.getElementById('searchBar').classList.toggle('active');
    }

    function updateGallery() {
        const query = document.getElementById('searchInput').value.toLowerCase();
        const activeCat = document.querySelector('.filter-btn.active').dataset.filter;
        document.querySelectorAll('.bento-card').forEach(card => {
            const matchesSearch = card.innerText.toLowerCase().includes(query);
            const matchesCat = activeCat === 'all' || card.dataset.cat === activeCat;
            card.classList.toggle('hidden', !(matchesSearch && matchesCat));
        });
    }

    document.querySelectorAll('.filter-btn').forEach(btn => {
        btn.onclick = () => {
            document.querySelectorAll('.filter-btn').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
            btn.classList.add('active');
            updateGallery();
        };
    });

    function restartCycle(card) {
        const cycler = card.querySelector('.word-cycler');
        const words = JSON.parse(card.dataset.words);
        cycler.innerHTML = words.map(w => `<span>${w}</span>`).join('');
        let step = 0;
        function stepLogic() {
            if (step < words.length - 1) {
                step++;
                cycler.style.transition = 'transform 0.8s cubic-bezier(0.65, 0, 0.35, 1)';
                cycler.style.transform = `translateY(-${step * WORD_HEIGHT}px)`;
                setTimeout(stepLogic, PAUSE);
            }
        }
        setTimeout(stepLogic, PAUSE);
    }

    document.querySelectorAll('.bento-card').forEach(restartCycle);
</script>
```
